parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.page_features (
  snapshot_id,
  page_type,
  cta_count,
  cta_labels,
  h1_text,
  plan_count,
  plan_names,
  has_free_tier,
  has_enterprise,
  trial_days,
  pricing_model,
  gating_signals,
  extraction_version,
  extraction_confidence
) VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $json.features.page_type }}',
  {{ $json.features.universal.cta_count }},
  ARRAY{{ $json.features.universal.cta_labels }}::TEXT[],
  '{{ $json.features.universal.h1_text }}',
  {{ $json.features.pricing.plan_count }},
  ARRAY{{ $json.features.pricing.plan_names }}::TEXT[],
  {{ $json.features.pricing.has_free_tier }},
  {{ $json.features.pricing.has_enterprise }},
  {{ $json.features.pricing.trial_days || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.features.pricing.pricing_model }}',
  ARRAY{{ $json.features.pricing.gating_signals }}::TEXT[],
  '{{ $json.features.extraction_version }}',
  {{ $json.features.extraction_confidence }}
)
RETURNING id;
